headlines.headline: Joval Brands signs multi-year partnership with a national infrastructure agency

sentiment.reasoning: An 18% margin improvement indicates strong operational efficiency and directly boosts bottom-line profitability.

sentiment.reasoning: A 12% margin improvement is positive, though less impactful than the previously reported 18% gain.

headlines.headline: Yorvov Pharmaceuticals completes planned facility upgrade in Southeast Asia

sentiment.reasoning: Completing a facility upgrade is an operational milestone that should improve long-term capacity and efficiency.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
